evals.prompt: I need to build a document processing pipeline that extracts text from PDFs, converts them to markdown, and then validates the output for quality. How should I design this as a multi-agent system with separate specialist agents for each step?
evals.expected_output: A design for a sequential pipeline with 3-4 agents (extractor, converter, validator, orchestrator) with defined roles and communication patterns

evals.prompt: Our team needs to analyze incoming customer support tickets - some need security review, others need technical investigation, and some are billing issues. I want an agent system that can parallelize these reviews and aggregate the results into a single priority report.
evals.expected_output: A fan-out/fan-in architecture with routing logic, parallel specialist agents (security, technical, billing), and an aggregator

evals.prompt: Build me a coding assistant system where one agent writes code, another reviews it, and they iterate until the code passes review. Include state management to track iteration count and quality scores.
evals.expected_output: An iterative refinement pattern with two agents (coder, reviewer), loop logic, state tracking, and quality thresholds
